title: Fiverr Scraper Input
description: Scrape Fiverr gigs, search results, and seller profiles at scale. Search by keyword, extract full gig details (packages, FAQ, reviews), or scrape seller profiles. Playwright + Apify Residential proxies. No API keys required.

mode.sectionDescription: Choose what to scrape on Fiverr.
mode.title: 🎯 Scraping Mode
mode.description: What type of Fiverr data to scrape.
enumTitles: 🔍 Search Gigs — search Fiverr by keyword, collect gig cards with pricing, ratings, seller info
📄 Gig Details — scrape full details from specific gig URLs (description, packages, FAQ, reviews)
👤 Seller Profiles — scrape seller profile pages (stats, badges, bio)

searchQuery.sectionDescription: Search Fiverr by keyword to find gigs matching your query.
searchQuery.title: 🔍 Search Query
searchQuery.description: Keyword or phrase to search for on Fiverr. Example: web scraping, logo design, Python script. Use Search Queries List below for batch search.

searchQueriesList.title: 🔍 Search Queries List (Batch Search)
searchQueriesList.description: Run multiple search queries in a single job — results are merged by scrape order. Overrides the single Search Query field when provided. Ideal for market research and competitor analysis. Example: ["logo design", "web scraping", "Python bot"]

category.title: 📂 Category
category.description: Optional Fiverr category to narrow search (e.g., 'data-entry', 'programming-tech'). Leave empty for all categories.

gigUrls.sectionDescription: Scrape full details from specific gig pages.
gigUrls.title: 📄 Gig URLs
gigUrls.description: Full Fiverr gig URLs to scrape detailed data from (description, packages, FAQ, seller info).

sellerUrls.title: 👤 Seller Profile URLs
sellerUrls.description: Full Fiverr seller profile URLs to scrape. Example: https://www.fiverr.com/sellerusername

includeReviews.title: ⭐ Include Reviews (Gig Details Mode)
includeReviews.description: When scraping gig details, also extract recent reviews (slower, more data).

maxResults.sectionDescription: Control output volume and proxy configuration.
maxResults.title: 🔢 Max Results
maxResults.description: Maximum number of results to return. Free users limited to 25 per run.

maxPages.title: 📄 Max Pages (Search Mode)
maxPages.description: Max search result pages to scrape per query (~24 gigs per page).

proxyConfiguration.sectionDescription: Fiverr uses PerimeterX bot protection. Residential proxies strongly recommended.
proxyConfiguration.title: 🔒 Proxy Configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Proxy settings. Fiverr blocks datacenter IPs — residential proxies strongly recommended.

unblockerProxyUrl.title: 🛡️ Unblocker Proxy URL (for reliable results)
unblockerProxyUrl.description: Fiverr's PerimeterX blocks Apify residential IPs on search. For reliable results, paste your own anti-bot / unblocker proxy URL (e.g. Bright Data Web Unlocker, ZenRows, ScrapingBee proxy endpoint): http://user:pass@host:port. When set, all requests route through it and warmup/IP-rotation are skipped. You pay your unblocker provider directly. Leave empty to use the (free but often blocked) residential path.
